PSY 410/510: Data Science for Psychology

Spring 2026  ·  Mon & Wed 12:00–1:20 PM  ·  Dr. Sara Weston

📌 Course Website:  sarajweston.com/datasci410

Slides, readings, schedule, content pages, and resource guides all live here.

Submit Your Work

  • 📝 Assignments 8 total — due Sundays at 11:59 PM
  • ✅ Reading Quizzes Weekly — due Tuesdays at 11:59 PM · unlimited attempts, best score counts
  • 📊 Final Project Milestones 4 stages — see project page for due dates
  • 👥 Pair Coding Check-ins Submit after each class session
  • 🏆 Team Fun Challenges Weekly team submissions

Getting Help

  • 🗓️ Book Office Hours Dr. Weston — Straub 325
  • Instructor: sweston2@uoregon.edu
  • TA: Amala Someshwar — asomeshw@uoregon.edu
  • 🔧 Common R Errors Guide Got a red error message? Start here.

Quick Links

  • 📖 R for Data Science (textbook)

Late work policy: All assignments and quizzes have a 48-hour grace period with a 10% daily penalty. After 48 hours, submissions are not accepted.
